name: carmelosantana/coqui-toolkit-wp-cli
description: WP-CLI toolkit for Coqui — manage WordPress plugins, themes, users, posts, database, multisite, and more via natural language

php-agents.description: WordPress management via WP-CLI — plugins, themes, users, posts, database backup/restore, multisite, core updates, cache, rewrites, search-replace, cron, and media

credentials.WP_CLI_SSH: SSH target for remote WordPress (e.g. user@host:/path/to/wp) — leave empty for local installs
credentials.WP_CLI_URL: Default site URL for multisite targeting (e.g. https://example.com) — leave empty for single-site installs
